statusLine.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$r = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Marcio Fernando Maia\Meu Drive (loteriasdacaixa2024@gmail.com)\extracao-de-boloes\json-boloes' -Filter '*.json' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $count = ($r | Measure-Object).Count; if ($count -eq 0) { Write-Output 'json-boloes: vazio' } else { $latest = ($r | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).Name; Write-Output "json-boloes: $count arquivos | ultimo: $latest" }"
